zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwenllian verch Hywel Felyn於1235年出生在英國威爾斯凱爾費利澤德時，她的父親Hywel Felyn ap Gruffudd66歲，母親Sara le Sore52歲。她和Dafydd ap Rhys至少有1個兒子。

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
meanings: A Welsh name. Some write the name Hoel, which they render 'lordly;' if so, it may come from huail, a vice-regent, regent. Arthur derives the surname Howell from Corn. -Brit, houl, the sun; and he adds, high, exalted.' But Hywel is rather from hywel, conspicuous.

nameMeanings.name: Felyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Guadalupe, Ignacio, Jose, Marcos, Ruben, Agustin, Alfredo, Alvino, Amalio, Ana, Apolonio, Carlos.

variants.name: Phelan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Kieran, Aine, Declan, Finbarr.
Anglicized form of Ó Faoláin ‘descendant of Faolán’, see Whelan .

nameMeanings.name: Gwenllian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from gwen, the feminine form of gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’ ( see Gwen ) + lliant ‘flood, flow’ (probably in the transferred sense ‘foamy’ or ‘white’, referring to a pale complexion).

en.lifeSummary: When Gwenllian verch Hywel Felyn was born in 1235, in Senghenydd, Caerphilly, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Hywel Felyn ap Gruffudd, was 66 and her mother, Sara le Sore, was 52. She had at least 1 son with Dafydd ap Rhys.

ko.lifeSummary: Gwenllian verch Hywel Felyn(이)가 1235년 영국 웨일스 카이르필리 센게이니드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hywel Felyn ap Gruffudd(은)는 66세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sara le Sore(은)는 52세였다. 그녀는 Dafydd ap Rhys(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwenllian verch Hywel Felyn родилась в 1235 г. в местности сеньхенидд, каирфилли, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Hywel Felyn ap Gruffudd было 66 лет, а матери, которую звали Sara le Sore, 52. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Dafydd ap Rhys.
